validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least {{min}} characters

signInDescription: Use your email and password to access this instance.
signUpDescription: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
name: Name
emailPasswordMismatch: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
invite.checkingAccess: Checking your company access. Try again in a moment.
invite.alreadyMember: This account already belongs to the company.
invite.notApproved: This join request was not approved.
invite.reviewSubmit: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
invite.createAccountFirst: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
invite.accountReady: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
